description.p: You have a bonus to AC while wearing this Breastplate. You also gain resistance to poison and acid damage.
This armor was forged by combining Breastplate made of Amphitere scales and enhancing it with a once broken Bloodiron Armor.
You have a +3 bonus to AC while wearing this Breastplate. You also gain resistance to poison and acid damage.

In addition, this armor has 3 charges. It regains 1 charge at dawn. With a bonus action, you may expend a charge to put a blood mark on a target you can see. You gain an additional +2 to attack and damage rolls against that target. The blood mark lasts one minute and a creature can only be marked once per day.
These magic bracers emmit a soft magical glow, having long lost their original strength inside. The bracers let you cast the Shield spell once, regaining its charge by dawn.

sheet.description: You may cast the shield spell without using a spellslot

description.p: Once per day, you may cast the shield spell without using a spellslot

sheet.description: You may cast the shield spell without using a spellslot

description.p: While you are holding this leather-bound book, you can use it as a spellcasting focus for your wizard spells, and you gain a +1 bonus to spell attack rolls and to the saving throw DCs of your wizard spells.

You can use this book as a spellbook. To attune yourself to this Legendary spellbook, you need to spend one straight hour bonding yourself with it. Once you are attuned to this spellbook, a mark appears on the palm of your hand. In addition, while you are attuned to this spellbook, you gain the following benefits

ul.li: The number of spells you are able to prepare is increased by your Spellcasting modifier *2
You find 3 additional spells inside the spellbook. The Spells count as always prepared and are determined by your DM

You can spend a magic action to store the book in your mark. The spellbook will automatically get stored inside of the mark if it is further than 5ft. away from you. You can spend a bonus action to summon the book into your hand if it is currently stored inside your mark.

description.p: While you are holding this leather-bound book, you can use it as a spellcasting focus for your wizard spells, and you gain a +1 bonus to spell attack rolls and to the saving throw DCs of your wizard spells.

You can use this book as a spellbook. To attune yourself to this Legendary spellbook, you need to spend one straight hour bonding yourself with it. Once you are attuned to this spellbook, a mark appears on the palm of your hand. In addition, while you are attuned to this spellbook, you gain the following benefits

ul.li: The number of spells you are able to prepare is increased by your Spellcasting modifier *2
You find 3 additional spells inside the spellbook. Those Spells are "Insightful Maneuver", "Alacritious Interpretation" and "Arcane Eye"

You can spend a magic action to store the book in your mark. The spellbook will automatically get stored inside of the mark if it is further than 5ft. away from you. You can spend a bonus action to summon the book into your hand if it is currently stored inside your mark.

description.p: You gain a +1 bonus to your AC with this rune
This sleeveless coat was made with the hide and scales oth a dragon. While wearing it you gain a +2 bonus to AC and resistance against damage dependant of the dragon used for the coats making.
This shiny helmet is often seen only by the wearers comrades and the people dying in front of him. When weearing this helmets, gain a +2 bous to AC.
You can transform the Helmet into a simple ear piece, making it easy to both hide and travel with the helmet.
While wearing this Cloak you gain the following benefits:

ul.li: You gain +1 to your AC. This doesn't count as armor.
You get resistance against poison and acid damage

description.p: Once per day you can choose one of two options, you can't use either one of these until the next dawn:

ul.li: You gain a swimming speed equal to your walking speed and you are able to hold your breath for 30 minutes.
You can cast fly once per day

description.p: If you use one of these options three times in a row without using the other it becomes unavailable untill you use the other one once.
This big gemstone is imbued with magic, yet suffers from the weaves might.
While equipped with this gem, you are able to cast the imbued spell but are restricted to these rules:

ul.li: After casting the imbued spell, once per round on your turn, roll a d6. If you roll a 5 or 6, the gem recharges and you may cast the spell again.
Every time you cast the imbued spell, roll a d100. If you roll a 1, the gem breaks and looses its magic.
Every time you use the gem the destruction roll dc doubles. (1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 32, 64, 100)
At the start of a new day the destruction roll dc decreases by 1d4 - 1.
If you don't use the gem for 24 hours the destruction roll dc halves
If the gem break, you and every creature and object within a 10 ft. radius receive 8d8 Force damage.

description.p: While wearing this caped armor you have a +2 bonus to your AC. This breastplate is adorned with a cape of coated metal wings. While wearing this armor, you do not have the usual disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.
Ground Shadow. While on the ground you gain an extra +1 bonus to AC and a +2 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

Swift Flyer. While in the air, you can spend a bonus action to use the dash action. Additionaly, when you are hir by an attack (but before the damage) you can use a reaction to move 5ft. out of the way to avoid the attack instead.
Extend Wings. Using a bonus action you can unfold the armors wings. You gain a flying speed of 45ft. and you may hover for up to 10 Minutes. After 10 Minutes you descent at a rate of 60ft. per round.
You can fly for up to 30 Minutes in one day and regain all the spent time flying after a long rest. When using Swift Flyer to escape an attack you loose 1 Minute of your flight time.
This bracelet is adorned with 5 gemstones resembling eyes, almost like marbles but more surreal.
While wearing this bracelet, you may spend charges to activate the following abilities:

ul.li: 1 Charge - Flying Eye: A tiny fly crawls out of one of the eye sockets of the bracelet. You can telepathically command the fly and see through its eye while closing your own eyes. The fly has a reach of 120ft., has 1 Hit Point and an AC of 14. It shares your vision types.

2 Charges - Inside Eye: You command a fly to embed itself into the skin of a creature. Make a spell attack. On a hit, the target suffer the poisoned condition for 1d6 rounds and takes 1d4 damage of your choice from Acid or Necrotic at the start of each of its turn as long as it has the poisoned condition.

3 Charges - I Fly: As an bonus action, you may teleport to the location of one of your flies. Make a Dexterity (Stealth) check against the nearest creature against their passive perception after the teleport. If there is no creature in a 60ft. radius, you automatically succeed on the check. If you succeed, you regain your bonus action.

description.p: You have 5 Charges, one for each Eye on the bracelet. You regain 1d4 charges daily at midnight or 1 charge whenever a fly enters the bracelet.
This bracelet is adorned with 5 gemstones resembling eyes, almost like marbles but more surreal.
While wearing this bracelet, you may spend charges to activate the following abilities:

ul.li: 1 Charge - Flying Eye: A tiny fly crawls out of one of the eye sockets of the bracelet. You can telepathically command the fly and see through its eye while closing your own eyes. The fly has a reach of 120ft., has 1 Hit Point and an AC of 14. It shares your vision types.

2 Charges - Inside Eye: You command a fly to embed itself into the skin of a creature. Make a spell attack. On a hit, the target suffer the poisoned condition for 1d6 rounds and takes 1d4 damage of your choice from Acid or Necrotic at the start of each of its turn as long as it has the poisoned condition.

3 Charges - I Fly: As an bonus action, you may teleport to the location of one of your flies. Make a Dexterity (Stealth) check against the nearest creature against their passive perception after the teleport. If there is no creature in a 60ft. radius, you automatically succeed on the check. If you succeed, you regain your bonus action.

description.p: You have 5 Charges, one for each Eye on the bracelet. You regain 1d4 charges daily at midnight or 1 charge whenever a fly enters the bracelet.
